item.title: Pharmacies hotfixes - 26.1.5 Iceland, Release date August 12, 2025 - Hotfixes
item.description:
69515 IS Dispense changed strength on pharmacy item
  • Allows the user to identify Pharmacy Items that 0 strength was changed by Lyfjastofnun to non-zero value. This was causing problems in Dose Dispensing since there were open e-prescriptions issued when the Item had 0 in strength and all quantities calculated in pills.

item.title: Pharmacies hotfixes - 26.1.5 Pharmacies, Release date September 9, 2025 - Hotfixes
item.description:
70635 Pharmacy Dispensation: Prices do not include VAT in dispense production orders
  • Calculated Price Incl. VAT in Dispense Production is based on the fieldPrice incl. VATin the PriceList line.

item.title: Localization hotfixes - 26.1.2 Local Functionality Germany, Release date July 22, 2025 - Hotfixes
item.description:
68239 LSC DE - Fiskaly Error: E_TX_NOT_FOUND Transaction not found in SIGN DE (In Local Functionality DE)
  • Fixed an issue where if a partner disabled their TSS and managed to create a new one and a new master cash register, the cash point closings would not work because we would still try to use the old cash point closings.
  • Fixed related issues such as client registering behavior and some procedures related to creating cash point closings such as fetching fiskaly transactions to create the API request.

item.title: Hotels hotfixes - 26.1.1 Hotels, Release date June 24, 2025 - Hotfixes
item.description:
68276 Refund process fails in some scenarios
  • Fixed an issue where a refund on the POS did not enable the PAY button. Applicable toAccrual Accountingonly.
  • Fixed an issue where refunding payment, including deposit charge, reused the already refunded deposit.
  • Fixed an issue regardingString too longin the refund panel on POS
  • When refunding a transaction that has a deposit and a tip in same transaction, you could only refund the tip but not the deposit amount. This was fixed.
  • Fixed an issue where POS showed wrong balance after refunding deposit after finalizing all folios (on reservations with both guest and company folios) - (issue with deposit assignment not being removed).
  • Removed the popup on preypayment in accrual accounting when paying on POS.
  • The amount is now auto-filled for the prepayment, when doing prepayment on the POS from PAY button (reservation still in house).

item.title: Hotels hotfixes - 26.1.2 Hotels, Release date July 1, 2025 - Hotfixes
item.description:
68752 Refunded Tip - posting not correct
  • Fixed an issue, where posting of the tip line after refund was incorrect, now when refunding the tip line it isremovedfrom the detailed revenue entry table. Users have to open the POS again and take the tip again from there.
68325 Group comments not showing on SGL res in POS
  • Fixed an issue, where posting of the tip line after refund was incorrect, now when refunding the tip line it isremovedfrom the detailed revenue entry table. Users have to open the POS again and take the tip again from there.
  • Group comments were not displayed on POS for reservations within group. This was fixed.
68324 Deposit appears when it has been consumed if deposit no.2 is not signed to folio
  • Fixed an issue, where posting of the tip line after refund was incorrect, now when refunding the tip line it isremovedfrom the detailed revenue entry table. Users have to open the POS again and take the tip again from there.
  • Group comments were not displayed on POS for reservations within group. This was fixed.
  • Fixed an issue on calculating deposit to use, when two deposits were done and were partially consumed.

item.title: Hotels hotfixes - 26.1.3 Hotels, Release date July 8, 2025 - Hotfixes
item.description:
68328 PMS: Nationality report not showing correct data
  • Fixed an issue where the guest list's country code was not updated correctly. This affected the Nationality Report.

item.title: Hotels hotfixes - 26.1.4 Hotels, Release date July 15, 2025 - Hotfixes
item.description:
68562 Balance on POS not correct after doing refund on payment with deposits and charges
  • The balance is now correct after doing a refund on a payment, that included deposit and charge (charged item that was originally paid on POS with deposit collection) and the errorNo Deposit available to consumedoes not show when the refunded amount is paid.
  • An issue where the company deposit was not being inserted to the journal if the deposit collection was unassigned (folio no = 0) was fixed. Now it checks for it and inserts if available, then users can just void that line if they do not want to use the deposit.

item.title: Hotels hotfixes - 26.1.5 Hotels, Release date July 22, 2025 - Hotfixes
item.description:
69255 LS Hotel > Tape Chart cuts the display of hotel reservations that runs through dates with more than 7 nights stay
  • Fixed an issue where reservations that were booked over new year disappeared when moving dates on the tape chart.
69196 Open Hotel Reservation Deposit page from the POS
  • Fixed an issue where reservations that were booked over new year disappeared when moving dates on the tape chart.
  • Now able to open the reservation deposit page from the folio deposit on the POS hotel template.
69155 Changing the Folio for a DRE posted to Finance results returns an error
  • Fixed an issue where reservations that were booked over new year disappeared when moving dates on the tape chart.
  • Now able to open the reservation deposit page from the folio deposit on the POS hotel template.
  • Fixed update issue on changingFolio No.for posted revenue lineDetailed Revenue Entry.
67503 Reconciliation tool - Fix duplicated room charge issues
  • Fixed an issue where reservations that were booked over new year disappeared when moving dates on the tape chart.
  • Now able to open the reservation deposit page from the folio deposit on the POS hotel template.
  • Fixed update issue on changingFolio No.for posted revenue lineDetailed Revenue Entry.
  • New changes added toReconciliation Toolto solve deposit issues related to duplicated charges to room created.
  • Added a new field next to filters toSkip Deposit Checks, so the process runs faster by enabling it. Disabled by default.
  • New action,Fix Duplicated Charges to Room, added to fix the records with code 'C2R:DUPLICATED' found previously in the fixing process:If duplicated DRE line is not posted to finance, it deactivates the line and creates a reversal line with negative original amount.If duplicated DRE line is posted to finance, it reverses the line as usual and needs to run the Night Audit to post it again.
  • If duplicated DRE line is not posted to finance, it deactivates the line and creates a reversal line with negative original amount.
  • If duplicated DRE line is posted to finance, it reverses the line as usual and needs to run the Night Audit to post it again.
  • Additionally,Fix tipsaction was changed to include also searching of duplicated tips. So in the searching process, it also looks for tips from duplicated room charges, it adds DUPLICATED label for them in Description field. The fixing process works also for it. New fieldRes. Balanceadded because some cases were found, that were fixed manually by using a negative res. extra, and balance is correct and does not need to be fixed. The user has the information to decide whether to fix it or not.

item.title: Hotels hotfixes - 26.1.6 Hotels, Release date August 12, 2025 - Hotfixes
item.description:
69717 Folio with only Deposit Assignment and no other charges not displayed in POS
  • After deleting a reservationExtra, with a deposit assigned, the Folio did not show, in the POS to allow a refund. This was fixed.
69199 Enhance usability in Invoice Management page
  • After deleting a reservationExtra, with a deposit assigned, the Folio did not show, in the POS to allow a refund. This was fixed.
  • Added more filters to the Invoice Management so users can more easily filter on Revenue entries:Description Filter,Paying Reservation Filter,Date Filter.
68960 Can not create a new Deposit Policy
  • After deleting a reservationExtra, with a deposit assigned, the Folio did not show, in the POS to allow a refund. This was fixed.
  • Added more filters to the Invoice Management so users can more easily filter on Revenue entries:Description Filter,Paying Reservation Filter,Date Filter.
  • Fixed an issue preventing the creation ofNew Deposit Policies.
68695 Show line prices on the folios component in reservation web template
  • After deleting a reservationExtra, with a deposit assigned, the Folio did not show, in the POS to allow a refund. This was fixed.
  • Added more filters to the Invoice Management so users can more easily filter on Revenue entries:Description Filter,Paying Reservation Filter,Date Filter.
  • Fixed an issue preventing the creation ofNew Deposit Policies.
  • Details not available.

item.title: Hotels hotfixes - 26.1.7 Hotels, Release date August 19, 2025 - Hotfixes
item.description:
70118 Tape Chart: fuzzy search doesn't work for room name
  • Fixed an issue where searching for Room on Tape Chart was case sensitive.
69952 Reconciliation Tool Fix for application of Cust Ledger Entry
  • Fixed an issue where searching for Room on Tape Chart was case sensitive.
  • Added new functionality to fix the previous Cust Ledger Entries applied to wrong reservations:New button in Hotel Reconciliation pageFix Cust. Ledger Entries AppliedNew page,Fix Cust. item.title: Hotels hotfixes - 26.1.8 Hotels, Release date August 22, 2025 - Hotfixes
item.description:
70121 Hotel POS Payment – Error Pop-up Resets Amount to $0.00
  • The new value was ignored, after an invalid refund amount was entered. This was fixed.
70120 Member Card No not linked when POS transaction started from the reservation page in POS
  • The new value was ignored, after an invalid refund amount was entered. This was fixed.
  • Fixed an issue where Member Card No was not in refund POS Trans
69803 Hotel Group Reservation Status is not allowed to be changed once confirmed (confirm if standard functionality)
  • The new value was ignored, after an invalid refund amount was entered. This was fixed.
  • Fixed an issue where Member Card No was not in refund POS Trans
  • It is now possible to change between different Confirmed statuses on individual and group reservations.Note:It is only possible to do this in group reservations if the new Status also exists for individual reservations (Reservation Type = Room).
69338 Adding an activity on a hotel POS using BOOKPRODLIST does not add the activity to DRE
  • The new value was ignored, after an invalid refund amount was entered. This was fixed.
  • Fixed an issue where Member Card No was not in refund POS Trans
  • It is now possible to change between different Confirmed statuses on individual and group reservations.Note:It is only possible to do this in group reservations if the new Status also exists for individual reservations (Reservation Type = Room).
  • Not callingUpdateActivityCust(Rec) procedure where theActivity Customeris being updated, if it exist in hotel but not in activity.
67784 Allocating Room in Backoffice changes the Unit on DRE
  • The new value was ignored, after an invalid refund amount was entered. This was fixed.
  • Fixed an issue where Member Card No was not in refund POS Trans
  • It is now possible to change between different Confirmed statuses on individual and group reservations.Note:It is only possible to do this in group reservations if the new Status also exists for individual reservations (Reservation Type = Room).
  • Not callingUpdateActivityCust(Rec) procedure where theActivity Customeris being updated, if it exist in hotel but not in activity.
  • There was an issue, allocating rooms in Backoffice changed the prices. This was fixed.
65684 Room gets housekeeping status Vacant-Clean even though room is still checked in
  • The new value was ignored, after an invalid refund amount was entered. This was fixed.
  • Fixed an issue where Member Card No was not in refund POS Trans
  • It is now possible to change between different Confirmed statuses on individual and group reservations.Note:It is only possible to do this in group reservations if the new Status also exists for individual reservations (Reservation Type = Room).
  • Not callingUpdateActivityCust(Rec) procedure where theActivity Customeris being updated, if it exist in hotel but not in activity.
  • There was an issue, allocating rooms in Backoffice changed the prices. This was fixed.
  • Housekeeping Status Vacant Clean and Vacant Cleaning Request are no longer allowed if Reservation is In House. Setting the status toCleanon an In House Reservation set the Housekeeping Status to Vacant Clean, instead ofOccupied Clean. This was fixed.

item.title: Hotels hotfixes - 26.1.9 Hotels, Release date August 26, 2025 - Hotfixes
item.description:
70164 Checked in reservation remains in the arrival list till users refresh the POS page
  • Fixed an issue on refreshing the arrival list in POS. When you came back from Reservation Card checked in, it did not refresh.
69818 Refund Folio balance deletes the Deposit Assignment for the other Folio(s)
  • Fixed an issue on refreshing the arrival list in POS. When you came back from Reservation Card checked in, it did not refresh.
  • Fixed a refund where deposit assignments got consumed.
69213 Deposit collection over reservation balance not possible, even if "Deposit Amount Over Res balance" field is filled out
  • Fixed an issue on refreshing the arrival list in POS. When you came back from Reservation Card checked in, it did not refresh.
  • Fixed a refund where deposit assignments got consumed.
  • Fixed the issue where deposit collection over reservation balance was not possible even if the Deposit Amount Over Reservation Balance in Hotel Setup was filled out. Now this was fixed and users can take deposit over reservation balance depending on this field from the Hotel Setup.

item.title: Hotels hotfixes - 26.1.10 Hotels, Release date August 29, 2025 - Hotfixes
item.description:
70592 Integration events for hotel
  • Details not available.
70231 Price for a line where paying for another reservation is not shown on Folio component in POS
  • Details not available.
  • The folio lines now show the correct value for the item.
70116 When allocating a room that has different room type separate nights it allocates in Tape Chart wrong
  • Details not available.
  • The folio lines now show the correct value for the item.
  • Hotel res entry page, opens up when the reservation is moved to manually set the room numbers if there are many room types.

item.title: Hotels hotfixes - 26.1.11 Hotels, Release date September 2, 2025 - Hotfixes
item.description:
70437 Error Code: 85132273 when doing refund deposit after night audit has been run
  • Error handling for process deposit payment in BackOffice does now avoid showing error logs that are already handled that does not affect the process.
70148 When deposit is on another folio than "guest" it won't show in POS
  • Error handling for process deposit payment in BackOffice does now avoid showing error logs that are already handled that does not affect the process.
  • Fixed an issue with not getting the deposit correctly inserted in POS journal when folio is another than default Guest onTemp BalanceorBlankAccounting (None).
68267 Print preview invoice for folio on POS not working
  • Error handling for process deposit payment in BackOffice does now avoid showing error logs that are already handled that does not affect the process.
  • Fixed an issue with not getting the deposit correctly inserted in POS journal when folio is another than default Guest onTemp BalanceorBlankAccounting (None).
  • Improvements to the printing behavior in the POS:If there are no Receipt No. or Sales Invoice for the folio - Print the Preview Sales Invoice.If there are Receipt No. and Sales Invoice for the folio - The user is prompted if he wants to print the Receipt or Sales Invoice.
  • If there are no Receipt No. or Sales Invoice for the folio - Print the Preview Sales Invoice.
  • If there are Receipt No. and Sales Invoice for the folio - The user is prompted if he wants to print the Receipt or Sales Invoice.

item.title: Hotels hotfixes - 26.1.12 Hotels, Release date September 9, 2025 - Hotfixes
item.description:
70803 Reservation Number added to General Ledger entries on Statement Posting
  • Fixed an issue where the hotel reservation number was added to G/L Entry created by POS Statement.

item.title: Hotels hotfixes - 26.1.13 Hotels, Release date September 16, 2025 - Hotfixes
item.description:
71333 Amount displayed on multiple Hotel Refunds
  • Fixed amount displayed on multiple Hotel Refunds from POS.
70918 Incorrect Reservation Payment Entry for Group Booking
  • Fixed amount displayed on multiple Hotel Refunds from POS.
  • Fixed the incorrect amount in the payment entry for Group Booking.
70351 New receipt numbers created
  • Fixed amount displayed on multiple Hotel Refunds from POS.
  • Fixed the incorrect amount in the payment entry for Group Booking.
  • Fixed issues where there are more than one POS Transaction per store/POS terminal. With this fix there can only be one POS Transaction per store/POS terminal number. If the user does not post (or void) the POS Transaction, it may be voided if a new command or hotel reservation is used, and a new one created.
68272 Deposit schedule is not updated correctly
  • Fixed amount displayed on multiple Hotel Refunds from POS.
  • Fixed the incorrect amount in the payment entry for Group Booking.
  • Fixed issues where there are more than one POS Transaction per store/POS terminal. With this fix there can only be one POS Transaction per store/POS terminal number. If the user does not post (or void) the POS Transaction, it may be voided if a new command or hotel reservation is used, and a new one created.
  • Deposit scheduler did not recalculate deposit due, after doing refund. This was fixed.
68229 Able to consume same deposit twice if I do not run Night Audit job
  • Fixed amount displayed on multiple Hotel Refunds from POS.
  • Fixed the incorrect amount in the payment entry for Group Booking.
  • Fixed issues where there are more than one POS Transaction per store/POS terminal. With this fix there can only be one POS Transaction per store/POS terminal number. If the user does not post (or void) the POS Transaction, it may be voided if a new command or hotel reservation is used, and a new one created.
  • Deposit scheduler did not recalculate deposit due, after doing refund. This was fixed.
  • Night Audit is Run for the reservation, when it is checked out to consume all paid deposit. The POS draws the deposit into the journal and marks it asused, to prevent using it twice. It also fixes updating DRE lines on deposit posting correctly.

item.description:
68469 SELLMEMDEPOSIT data table gets stuck
  • Fixed an issue where POS search panel was frozen for the command SELLMEMDEPOSIT.
68263 Add PurchaseOffline option to EFT in version 24, 25 and 26 versions
  • Fixed an issue where POS search panel was frozen for the command SELLMEMDEPOSIT.
  • Details not available.
68224 Customer ledger entries not being created AGAIN when there is a rounding difference between the customer account tender and payment tender being used
  • Fixed an issue where POS search panel was frozen for the command SELLMEMDEPOSIT.
  • Details not available.
  • When payment Info Account from POS was made and posted throughStatement Post, it resulted in abnormal rounding. This was fixed.
68144 Void and Copy is missing card information on voided card payment line
  • Fixed an issue where POS search panel was frozen for the command SELLMEMDEPOSIT.
  • Details not available.
  • When payment Info Account from POS was made and posted throughStatement Post, it resulted in abnormal rounding. This was fixed.
  • When doing Void and Copy in the POS the voided payment line was not being updated with the card information. This was fixed.

item.title: Autotests hotfixes - 26.1.2 Autotests, Release date July 1, 2025 - Hotfixes

68155 Creating membership card with more than 20 characteres at POS

68036 Error Message The member coupon buffer does not exist
  • Prevented overflow error on POS when Member Card length exceeds twenty characters.

67285 Customer Order Refund incorrect Refund Status
  • Prevented overflow error on POS when Member Card length exceeds twenty characters.

item.title: Autotests hotfixes - 26.1.3 Autotests, Release date July 8, 2025 - Hotfixes
item.description:
68248 Valid Offer not triggered in Hospitality POS
  • Resolved discount was not applied when the Member Club did not have attributes.
68160 Member card number missing error when editing a CO with member points payment
  • Resolved discount was not applied when the Member Club did not have attributes.
  • Updated record on the POS Transactionssingleinstancecodeunit.
  • Fixed an issue on backoffice when opening the Member Card from a Customer order.
68071 Payment difference G/L line in Sales Order linked to CO
  • Resolved discount was not applied when the Member Club did not have attributes.
  • Updated record on the POS Transactionssingleinstancecodeunit.
  • Fixed an issue on backoffice when opening the Member Card from a Customer order.
  • Rounding issue was solved when a second Sales Order was created from Customer Order. CO was created for Warehouse delivery. The SO was partly delivered. Then the Customer Order was edited on POS and additional Item was added. That resulted in an abnormal rounding line, created in the second Sales Order.

69853 SumAmountInclVATByCustomerOrderID calculates in LCY causing error creating Customer Orders
  • Customer Orders and Sales Orders are now in the same currency when creating SO and CO values.
68667 Incorrect VAT calculation on Sales Order created by Customer Order
  • Customer Orders and Sales Orders are now in the same currency when creating SO and CO values.

70369 Request user to enter search criteria on Member Contact panel
  • Details not available.
65635 Unexpected behavior with REORDQTY POS Command
  • Details not available.
  • REORDERQTY and REORDERMENUTYPE commands were refactored to fix problems with quantity, line numbers and transaction entries of linked lines.

item.title: Autotests hotfixes - 26.1.11 Autotests, Release date August 28, 2025 - Hotfixes
item.description:
69925 Unable to change discount on discount offer products
  • Now it is possible to change discount on discount offer products.
69906 Insufficient Quantity on Receipt Item During Statement Posting - Recipe BOMs
  • Now it is possible to change discount on discount offer products.
  • Statement posting now works with excluded recipe/ingredients and Inventory Setup optionPrevent Negative Inventory.

item.title: Autotests hotfixes - 26.1.12 Autotests, Release date September 8, 2025 - Hotfixes
item.description:
70835 Member Point Offer Not Triggering by Item Category After Upgrade to Version 26.1
  • The list of offers were only filtered by Item. This was fixed and now finds an offer based on all types.
70601 Member Scheme Upgrade Skips a Level
  • The list of offers were only filtered by Item. This was fixed and now finds an offer based on all types.
  • Details not available.
70216 Referenced refund - Partial amount refund
  • The list of offers were only filtered by Item. This was fixed and now finds an offer based on all types.
  • Details not available.
  • When doing a referenced refund on a card payment in the POS, the POS now is able to do a partial amount refund. that is not fully refund the entire original amount of the card payment. The refunded amount for the card payment is stored on the original Card Entry for the payment and can be viewed in theTransaction Registry->Card Entriesview for the original transaction.
  • When doing a second refund on the same payment the amount that is presented to the cashier has to be the remaining amount available for refund on the card payment not the original amount.
  • To activate this functionality configurationsUse Reference RefundandUse Refund Selectionmust both be active.

  • AddedOnAfterInitReversTransLineDiscRecevent on codeunit POS Price Utility.
  • An issue was fixed, that could cause mismatch in payment status on an activity, and the related reservation. When an activity is pulled into POS journal line, the insert process and the assignment of receipt/line towards the activity is now within same commit and should eliminate any issues related to errors during the payment process on POS.
68287 Wrong ILE for NEG_ADJ on BOM Components when Posting Statement
  • New EventOnBeforePrintCardAccountNoin POS Print Utility.

  • An issue was fixed, that could cause mismatch in payment status on an activity, and the related reservation. When an activity is pulled into POS journal line, the insert process and the assignment of receipt/line towards the activity is now within same commit and should eliminate any issues related to errors during the payment process on POS.
  • Quantity was wrong when using NEG_ADJ on BOM Items on the POS. This was fixed.
68268 Customer order process breaks if order is posted as customer invoice

When an activity is pulled into POS journal line, the insert process and the assignment of receipt/line towards the activity is now within same commit and should eliminate any issues related to errors during the payment process on POS.

  • When a Customer Order is collected and finalized on POS with thePost + Print Customer Invoice(POSTINVOICE) the Customer Order is posted if fully collected and paid.

When an activity is pulled into POS journal line, the insert process and the assignment of receipt/line towards the activity is now within same commit and should eliminate any issues related to errors during the payment process on POS.

  • New EventOnBeforePrintCardAccountNoin POS Print Utility.

When an activity is pulled into POS journal line, the insert process and the assignment of receipt/line towards the activity is now within same commit and should eliminate any issues related to errors during the payment process on POS.

  • AddedOnAfterInitReversTransLineDiscRecevent on codeunit POS Price Utility.
  • An issue was fixed, that could cause mismatch in payment status on an activity, and the related reservation. When an activity is pulled into POS journal line, the insert process and the assignment of receipt/line towards the activity is now within same commit and should eliminate any issues related to errors during the payment process on POS.
  • Quantity was wrong when using NEG_ADJ on BOM Items on the POS. This was fixed.
  • When a Customer Order is collected and finalized on POS with thePost + Print Customer Invoice(POSTINVOICE) the Customer Order is posted if fully collected and paid.
  • Fixed number series gap when creating statements.
  • Details not available.
  • When payment Info Account from POS was made and posted throughStatement Post, it resulted in abnormal rounding. This was fixed.

68644 Public Methods in Periodic Discounts #531

  • Details not available.

66098 Serial Number handling on the POS
  • Made three procedures publicly available in Periodic discount.
  • New EventOnBeforeFindLastTenderDeclin Statement-Calculate codeunit.
  • Fixed overflow issue inFind Entries codewhen using long values in External Document number.

  • Details not available.
  • Wrong Refund status was displayed on Customer Order. This was fixed. If not refunded on POS,Payment Pendingshould be displayed.
  • New option was added in Retail item cardLSC Assign SerialNo/LotNo In CO Picking, which specifies whether to delay assigning SerialNo/LotNo until the picking of the item in the Customer Order. If this field is selected, the SerialNo/LotNo is assigned when the item is picked in the CO. If this field is not selected, the SerialNo/LotNo is assigned when the item is added to POS.

  • Made three procedures publicly available in Periodic discount.
  • New EventOnBeforeFindLastTenderDeclin Statement-Calculate codeunit.

  • New option was added in Retail item cardLSC Assign SerialNo/LotNo In CO Picking, which specifies whether to delay assigning SerialNo/LotNo until the picking of the item in the Customer Order. If this field is selected, the SerialNo/LotNo is assigned when the item is picked in the CO. If this field is not selected, the SerialNo/LotNo is assigned when the item is added to POS.
  • Reprice on refund skipped. This was fixed.

item.title: LS Centralhotfixes - 26.1.4, Release date July 8, 2025 - Hotfixes
item.description:
68822 No change in service charge on total press when sales type is changes from dine in to takeaway
  • If a retail charge is inserted onTotalPressedbased on a sales type, and then lines with that sales type, change sales type, or are voided, whenTotalPressedis pressed again, the retail charge line becomes voided.
68675 Error in codeunit LSCShopifySchOrder "COpayment already exist with blank DocumentID, Store = web and Line No. 10000
  • If a retail charge is inserted onTotalPressedbased on a sales type, and then lines with that sales type, change sales type, or are voided, whenTotalPressedis pressed again, the retail charge line becomes voided.
  • Details not available.
68634 ValidateTaxParameter not working as expected
  • If a retail charge is inserted onTotalPressedbased on a sales type, and then lines with that sales type, change sales type, or are voided, whenTotalPressedis pressed again, the retail charge line becomes voided.
  • Details not available.
  • EventOnBeforeValidationOfTaxCalculationadded to Customer Order Line table.
68623 Added OnBeforeOutgoingShopifyImageData event #530
  • If a retail charge is inserted onTotalPressedbased on a sales type, and then lines with that sales type, change sales type, or are voided, whenTotalPressedis pressed again, the retail charge line becomes voided.
  • Details not available.
  • EventOnBeforeValidationOfTaxCalculationadded to Customer Order Line table.
  • Shopify Image Events activatedOnBeforeOutgoingShopifyImageData2OnAfterProcessShopifyImageData2
  • OnBeforeOutgoingShopifyImageData2
  • OnAfterProcessShopifyImageData2
  • Note:Event will be added to Central 26.1. Central 27 uses GraphQL for images, so these events will not be available there as the process for image uploads are totally different.
68433 Reprice on refund when member added
  • If a retail charge is inserted onTotalPressedbased on a sales type, and then lines with that sales type, change sales type, or are voided, whenTotalPressedis pressed again, the retail charge line becomes voided.
  • Details not available.
  • EventOnBeforeValidationOfTaxCalculationadded to Customer Order Line table.
  • Shopify Image Events activatedOnBeforeOutgoingShopifyImageData2OnAfterProcessShopifyImageData2
  • OnBeforeOutgoingShopifyImageData2
  • OnAfterProcessShopifyImageData2
  • Note:Event will be added to Central 26.1. Central 27 uses GraphQL for images, so these events will not be available there as the process for image uploads are totally different.
  • Reprice on refund was skipped. This was fixed.
68396 Setting 0 Discount on Payment Lines sets Amount to 0
  • If a retail charge is inserted onTotalPressedbased on a sales type, and then lines with that sales type, change sales type, or are voided, whenTotalPressedis pressed again, the retail charge line becomes voided.
  • Details not available.
  • EventOnBeforeValidationOfTaxCalculationadded to Customer Order Line table.
  • Shopify Image Events activatedOnBeforeOutgoingShopifyImageData2OnAfterProcessShopifyImageData2
  • OnBeforeOutgoingShopifyImageData2
  • OnAfterProcessShopifyImageData2
  • Note:Event will be added to Central 26.1. Central 27 uses GraphQL for images, so these events will not be available there as the process for image uploads are totally different.

item.title: LS Centralhotfixes - 26.1.6, Release date July 15, 2025 - Hotfixes
item.description:
69222 Some cleanup for LSC-69172
  • Details not available.
69161 AL: Fix Variant using Desc as name
  • Details not available.
  • Fixed Error: OPTION_DOES_NOT_EXIST, whenUse Variant Descriptionoption is checked under Shopify Administration page.
  • Fixed fulfillment handling from Shopify that caused invalid order ID error and wrong qtr of items were shipped.
69032 Requested event to clear uncompressed discount voucher lines #535
  • Details not available.
  • Fixed Error: OPTION_DOES_NOT_EXIST, whenUse Variant Descriptionoption is checked under Shopify Administration page.
  • Fixed fulfillment handling from Shopify that caused invalid order ID error and wrong qtr of items were shipped.
  • New eventOnBeforeClearDiscountEntryTmpwas added toLSC POS Post Utilitycodeunit.
68961 An event to have an option to change or skip the prompt message when using the Print_Z Command
  • Details not available.
  • Fixed Error: OPTION_DOES_NOT_EXIST, whenUse Variant Descriptionoption is checked under Shopify Administration page.
  • Fixed fulfillment handling from Shopify that caused invalid order ID error and wrong qtr of items were shipped.
  • New eventOnBeforeClearDiscountEntryTmpwas added toLSC POS Post Utilitycodeunit.
  • New eventOnBeforeZReportConfirmwas added toLSC POS Transaction Implcodeunit.
67746 Discounts not recalculated and added to modifiers when added after the discount is triggered
  • Details not available.
  • Fixed Error: OPTION_DOES_NOT_EXIST, whenUse Variant Descriptionoption is checked under Shopify Administration page.
  • Fixed fulfillment handling from Shopify that caused invalid order ID error and wrong qtr of items were shipped.
  • New eventOnBeforeClearDiscountEntryTmpwas added toLSC POS Post Utilitycodeunit.
  • New eventOnBeforeZReportConfirmwas added toLSC POS Transaction Implcodeunit.
  • Periodic discounts are now applied to linked modifier lines when they are inserted into the transaction. Previously, a discount offer on modifier lines were applied to modifier lines if the discount offer was activated, after selecting modifiers (for example, if member scanned after selecting the modifiers then that action, activated a discount offer).

item.description:
69777 Overflow Error When Adding Items to Replen. Journal with Spanish Translation
  • When adding items to theReplen. Journal, the system runs into an overflow error when Business Central is using Spanish Mexico translation. This was fixed.
69108 Specific Pages do not work with Responsibility Center filter
  • When adding items to theReplen. Journal, the system runs into an overflow error when Business Central is using Spanish Mexico translation. This was fixed.
  • Filter multiple documents correctly with the user's Responsibility Center filter defined in user setup.

69978 Published Offer not showing

  • Redundant local variable removed, to get access to the results from theGetDirectMarketingInfo WS.

item.title: LS Centralhotfixes - 26.1.16, Release date August 14, 2025 - Hotfixes
item.description:
69994 Customer Order Edit - Refund Returns an Error
  • Multiple add and void lines on POS could result in an error:Customer Order cannot be Updated. Changes will be rolled back. This was fixed.
69982 Customer Order/Sales Order amount check
  • Multiple add and void lines on POS could result in an error:Customer Order cannot be Updated. Changes will be rolled back. This was fixed.
  • Customer Orders and Sales Orders created error in mismatch amounts. That was fixed. This was related to Customer orders in currency other than LCY.
69903 AL: Fix WS interfaces
  • Multiple add and void lines on POS could result in an error:Customer Order cannot be Updated. Changes will be rolled back. This was fixed.
  • Customer Orders and Sales Orders created error in mismatch amounts. That was fixed. This was related to Customer orders in currency other than LCY.
  • Made SendRequest WS function publicCustomerOrderCancelCustomerOrderCreateV6CustomerOrderEditMemberContactCreateMemberContactUpdate.
  • CustomerOrderCancel
  • CustomerOrderCreateV6
  • CustomerOrderEdit
  • MemberContactCreate
  • MemberContactUpdate.

item.title: LS Centralhotfixes - 26.1.17, Release date August 19, 2025 - Hotfixes
item.description:
70158 Upgrade failed from LS 25.3 to 26.1
  • When upgrading WKS tables: Check,put in on new tablesbeing empty - upgrade only done if they are.
70067 Referenced refund payments - format the amount
  • When upgrading WKS tables: Check,put in on new tablesbeing empty - upgrade only done if they are.
  • When displaying referenced refund payment list, in a region where the decimal point is a comma, the list displaying the cards payments for refund was not being formatted correctly. This was fixed. When voiding a card payment within the same day, the POS does not try to retrieve token storage information for the voided payment.
70026 Fix coupon discount in Customer Order
  • When upgrading WKS tables: Check,put in on new tablesbeing empty - upgrade only done if they are.
  • When displaying referenced refund payment list, in a region where the decimal point is a comma, the list displaying the cards payments for refund was not being formatted correctly. This was fixed. When voiding a card payment within the same day, the POS does not try to retrieve token storage information for the voided payment.
  • Coupon discount % calculation is not taking into account quantity when processing collect from web Customer Order.
70004 Need to be able to filter inactive variants
  • When upgrading WKS tables: Check,put in on new tablesbeing empty - upgrade only done if they are.
  • When displaying referenced refund payment list, in a region where the decimal point is a comma, the list displaying the cards payments for refund was not being formatted correctly. This was fixed. When voiding a card payment within the same day, the POS does not try to retrieve token storage information for the voided payment.
  • Coupon discount % calculation is not taking into account quantity when processing collect from web Customer Order.
  • EventOnBeforeFindItemVariantswas added toPopup Variant HandlerandPop-up POS Commandsto enable the user to filter on item variants shown in the pop-up.
69992 Focus does not go to POS after completing a purchase in a SaaS environment
  • When upgrading WKS tables: Check,put in on new tablesbeing empty - upgrade only done if they are.
  • When displaying referenced refund payment list, in a region where the decimal point is a comma, the list displaying the cards payments for refund was not being formatted correctly. This was fixed. When voiding a card payment within the same day, the POS does not try to retrieve token storage information for the voided payment.
  • Coupon discount % calculation is not taking into account quantity when processing collect from web Customer Order.
  • EventOnBeforeFindItemVariantswas added toPopup Variant HandlerandPop-up POS Commandsto enable the user to filter on item variants shown in the pop-up.
  • Details not available.
69963 LSTS-39665: Delete price check records #554
  • When upgrading WKS tables: Check,put in on new tablesbeing empty - upgrade only done if they are.
  • When displaying referenced refund payment list, in a region where the decimal point is a comma, the list displaying the cards payments for refund was not being formatted correctly. This was fixed. When voiding a card payment within the same day, the POS does not try to retrieve token storage information for the voided payment.
  • Coupon discount % calculation is not taking into account quantity when processing collect from web Customer Order.
  • EventOnBeforeFindItemVariantswas added toPopup Variant HandlerandPop-up POS Commandsto enable the user to filter on item variants shown in the pop-up.
  • Details not available.
  • New eventOnBeforeInsertNewTransadded toLSC Price Check Cardpage.

item.title: LS Centralhotfixes - 26.1.18, Release date August 20, 2025 - Hotfixes
item.description:
70264 Booking POS Posting: Make the Cleanup function lock unfriendly
  • The Booking Posting POS cleanup () function made more lock efficient by checking if it is empty prior and also the search loop is not started in record locking mode.
  • Note:This function should rarely write anything to the db. It would be only in the cases where the POS created a reservation, but the user voided the lines. The reservation would not have any activities and the cleanup tries to delete the empty reservation.
70175 AL: Fix GetSelectedSalesDoc WS
  • The Booking Posting POS cleanup () function made more lock efficient by checking if it is empty prior and also the search loop is not started in record locking mode.
  • Note:This function should rarely write anything to the db. It would be only in the cases where the POS created a reservation, but the user voided the lines. The reservation would not have any activities and the cleanup tries to delete the empty reservation.
  • GetSelectedSalesDocReward Points earned was fixed.Transaction lookup was fixed, because of empty Transaction record.Deal line was missing in HospOrder. This was fixed.Change Payment Line number to actual number + 99 to be able to retrieve original line number.
  • Reward Points earned was fixed.
  • Transaction lookup was fixed, because of empty Transaction record.
  • Deal line was missing in HospOrder. This was fixed.
  • Change Payment Line number to actual number + 99 to be able to retrieve original line number.
  • GetSalesInfoByOrderIdTransaction lookup was fixed, because of empty Transaction record.
  • Transaction lookup was fixed, because of empty Transaction record.
70154 Customer Order Edit - Refund Returns an Error - Copy
  • The Booking Posting POS cleanup () function made more lock efficient by checking if it is empty prior and also the search loop is not started in record locking mode.
  • Note:This function should rarely write anything to the db. It would be only in the cases where the POS created a reservation, but the user voided the lines. The reservation would not have any activities and the cleanup tries to delete the empty reservation.
  • GetSelectedSalesDocReward Points earned was fixed.Transaction lookup was fixed, because of empty Transaction record.Deal line was missing in HospOrder. This was fixed.Change Payment Line number to actual number + 99 to be able to retrieve original line number.
  • Reward Points earned was fixed.
  • Transaction lookup was fixed, because of empty Transaction record.
  • Deal line was missing in HospOrder. This was fixed.
  • Change Payment Line number to actual number + 99 to be able to retrieve original line number.
  • GetSalesInfoByOrderIdTransaction lookup was fixed, because of empty Transaction record.
  • Transaction lookup was fixed, because of empty Transaction record.
  • Fixed problem when multiple add and void lines on POS could result in error:Customer Order cannot be Updated. Changes will be rolled back.

item.title: LS Centralhotfixes - 26.1.21, Release date August 28, 2025 - Hotfixes
item.description:
70331 'tender Operation' and 'FLOAT_ENT' handling - event missing a parameter
  • A new parameter,SafTenderDataTablevariable was added in existing eventOnBeforeInitMenuOnInitSafTenderPanelin LSC Safe Denom. Panel Commands codeunit.
70115 SC-2688-Public Method Request - LSC TR: Store Credit voucher extra print slip required during returns
  • A new parameter,SafTenderDataTablevariable was added in existing eventOnBeforeInitMenuOnInitSafTenderPanelin LSC Safe Denom. Panel Commands codeunit.
  • PrintExtraPaymentprocedure made public in POS Print Utility.
70101 Refund issue in Offline POS_V2
  • A new parameter,SafTenderDataTablevariable was added in existing eventOnBeforeInitMenuOnInitSafTenderPanelin LSC Safe Denom. Panel Commands codeunit.
  • PrintExtraPaymentprocedure made public in POS Print Utility.
  • Bugfix to not compress POS Sales Lines when returning items linked to parent lines.
70010 Suspend Transaction after marking lines as CO returns an Error
  • A new parameter,SafTenderDataTablevariable was added in existing eventOnBeforeInitMenuOnInitSafTenderPanelin LSC Safe Denom. Panel Commands codeunit.
  • PrintExtraPaymentprocedure made public in POS Print Utility.
  • Bugfix to not compress POS Sales Lines when returning items linked to parent lines.
  • Now Customer Order transactions can be suspended. However, it is only possiblebeforethe Customer Order is created.
69925 Unable to change discount on discount offer products
  • A new parameter,SafTenderDataTablevariable was added in existing eventOnBeforeInitMenuOnInitSafTenderPanelin LSC Safe Denom. Panel Commands codeunit.
  • PrintExtraPaymentprocedure made public in POS Print Utility.
  • Bugfix to not compress POS Sales Lines when returning items linked to parent lines.
  • Now Customer Order transactions can be suspended. However, it is only possiblebeforethe Customer Order is created.
  • Now it is possible to change discount on discount offer products.
69906 Insufficient Quantity on Receipt Item During Statement Posting - Recipe BOMs
  • A new parameter,SafTenderDataTablevariable was added in existing eventOnBeforeInitMenuOnInitSafTenderPanelin LSC Safe Denom. Panel Commands codeunit.
  • PrintExtraPaymentprocedure made public in POS Print Utility.
  • Bugfix to not compress POS Sales Lines when returning items linked to parent lines.
  • Now Customer Order transactions can be suspended. However, it is only possiblebeforethe Customer Order is created.
  • Now it is possible to change discount on discount offer products.
  • Statement posting now works with excluded recipe/ingredients and Inventory Setup optionPrevent Negative Inventory.

  • The count and amount of suspended transactions was incorrect. This was fixed.
64793 If a Line Discount Reset occurs, no new Line discount can be awarded
  • New eventOnBeforeRegisterMixMatchandOnAfterCalcDiscountPradded toLSC POS Price Utilitycodeunit.
  • New parameter:Returnvaluein eventOnSuspendNotConfirmedBeforeConfirmin POS Transactions Functions codeunit.
  • New eventOnBeforeRemoveAddadded toLSC POS Post Utilitycodeunit.
  • Details not available.
  • There was an error with Shopify Location setup. It was not correct and could cause CopyStr Error when updating inventory. This was fixed.
  • The count and amount of suspended transactions was incorrect. This was fixed.
  • It is now allowed to addLine Discountsto lines where a reset discount was previously applied.

item.title: LS Centralhotfixes - 26.1.24, Release date September 8, 2025 - Hotfixes
item.description:
70835 Member Point Offer Not Triggering by Item Category After Upgrade to Version 26.1
  • The list of offers were only filtered by Item. This was fixed and now finds an offer based on all types.
70601 Member Scheme Upgrade Skips a Level
  • The list of offers were only filtered by Item. This was fixed and now finds an offer based on all types.
  • Details not available.
70382 Activity Matrix blank in v26
  • The list of offers were only filtered by Item. This was fixed and now finds an offer based on all types.
  • Details not available.
  • Fixed and issue where the matrix could be empty when loaded.
70216 Referenced refund - Partial amount refund
  • The list of offers were only filtered by Item. This was fixed and now finds an offer based on all types.
  • Details not available.
  • Fixed and issue where the matrix could be empty when loaded.
  • When doing a referenced refund on a card payment in the POS, the POS now is able to do a partial amount refund. that is not fully refund the entire original amount of the card payment. The refunded amount for the card payment is stored on the original Card Entry for the payment and can be viewed in theTransaction Registry->Card Entriesview for the original transaction.
  • When doing a second refund on the same payment the amount that is presented to the cashier has to be the remaining amount available for refund on the card payment not the original amount.
  • To activate this functionality configurationsUse Reference RefundandUse Refund Selectionmust both be active.
69530 LSC NA CA - Split the bill in 2, and the amount with taxes is not equally split
  • The list of offers were only filtered by Item. This was fixed and now finds an offer based on all types.
  • Details not available.
  • Fixed and issue where the matrix could be empty when loaded.
  • When doing a referenced refund on a card payment in the POS, the POS now is able to do a partial amount refund. that is not fully refund the entire original amount of the card payment. The refunded amount for the card payment is stored on the original Card Entry for the payment and can be viewed in theTransaction Registry->Card Entriesview for the original transaction.
  • When doing a second refund on the same payment the amount that is presented to the cashier has to be the remaining amount available for refund on the card payment not the original amount.
  • To activate this functionality configurationsUse Reference RefundandUse Refund Selectionmust both be active.
  • Details not available.

  • There was an issue when the same bag number was used for separate entries then the bag was closed. This was fixed. There was also an error with a bag that had a remaining amount different from the starting amount, the bag was not able to post a safe transfer. This was fixed.
69309 License manager setup error in French
  • Details not available.
  • There was an issue when the same bag number was used for separate entries then the bag was closed. This was fixed. There was also an error with a bag that had a remaining amount different from the starting amount, the bag was not able to post a safe transfer. This was fixed.
  • Increased variable size to handle translations that require more characters.

item.title: LS Centralhotfixes - 26.1.27, Release date September 16, 2025 - Hotfixes
item.description:
71686 Incorrect posting when partially returning Customer Order
  • Customer Order Edit: duplicate payment line was created whenSales Orderwas posted and a line had been voided and refunded on POS.
71470 Decimal places issue in Inc/Exp Entries.
  • Customer Order Edit: duplicate payment line was created whenSales Orderwas posted and a line had been voided and refunded on POS.
  • Rounding of Net Amount was fixed on returns when canceling prepayments and returning with cash.
71276 Event to skip ItemBaseUnitOfMeasureOnAfterValidateEvent - codeunit 10036991 "LSC Product Ext." implements "LSC IProductExt"
  • Customer Order Edit: duplicate payment line was created whenSales Orderwas posted and a line had been voided and refunded on POS.
  • Rounding of Net Amount was fixed on returns when canceling prepayments and returning with cash.
  • New event,OnBeforeItemBaseUnitOfMeasureOnAfterValidateEventwas added toLSC Product Ext.codeunit.
70972 Changes in Subform Objects for Variant Frameworks
  • Customer Order Edit: duplicate payment line was created whenSales Orderwas posted and a line had been voided and refunded on POS.
  • Rounding of Net Amount was fixed on returns when canceling prepayments and returning with cash.
  • New event,OnBeforeItemBaseUnitOfMeasureOnAfterValidateEventwas added toLSC Product Ext.codeunit.
  • Allowed global variablesgIsLSCentralPageandgIsShowLinesPageto be changed outside the page extension, setting it as protected.
